findings.evidence: Grep shows the generic theorem is declared at line 44 and only used at line 178 to prove `matrixCoefficientSubalgebra_eq_top_of_submodule_eq_top`; the roadmap target at `TauCetiRoadmap/ReductiveGroups/README.md:136-138` only needs the matrix-coefficient generation statement.
findings.fix: Make this helper `private`/local, or move it to an appropriate general algebra file if TauCeti intentionally wants to support it as public API.
findings.issue: `TauCeti.Algebra.adjoin_eq_top_of_span_eq_top` is a public generic algebra theorem introduced only to prove the matrix-coefficient-specific result, so importing the matrix-coefficient file exposes unrelated algebra API.

summary: The matrix-coefficient generated objects now have the expected direct API, but the PR also publishes a generic algebra helper from this specialized comodule file. That broadens the public TauCeti.Algebra surface beyond the named downstream target.
